4:
To increase your chances of reaching Yotsuyu, Hien proposes that you split into two groups. He will comprise one, while you, Gosetsu, and Yugiri will comprise the other. The fate of a nation shall be decided this day─see to your preparations and venture unto the flooded fortress!

※Challenge Doma Castle with other players via the Duty Finder, or with a party of NPCs via Duty Support. Both systems are accessible from the main menu as well as the dungeon's entrance point.
